alkylation reagent: Protein alkylation was performed with iodoacetamide (IAA, final concentration 40mM)
cleavage agent: loading 0.5 μg of trypsin/LysC (Promega, Madison, WI, USA)
collision energy: 30% HCD Collision Energy and an AGC target of 5x103
instrument: analyzed using an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer
labeling: Quantitative microproteomics analysis of the proteins extracted from the isolated amyloidoma regions led to the identification of 212 to 911 proteins groups
reduction reagent: Proteins were reduced with dithiothreitol (final concentration 20 mM)
